'''Kelarea''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tynna sector/Legends|Tynna sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], the [[Majestic (Acclamator-class)|''Majestic'']] traveled to Kelarea after it recovered the wreckage of [[TIV Z590/1]] and the body of [[Sicko/Legends|CT-1127/549]]. The [[Traffic Interdiction Vessel]] and the [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]] were both lost during a [[Traffic Interdiction Operations|TIOPS]] [[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection|mission]] conducted by [[Omega Squad]] at the nearby [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian]]–[[Perlemian node|Perlemian]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] intersection.<ref name="RC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
